title: PhoneInput
description: International phone number field with a searchable country selector, configurable output format and full accessibility support.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Phone input with label. Country defaults to US. The number portion is bound via v-model.
basic.label: Phone

country.title: Controlled country
country.desc: Use v-model:country to control the country externally and react to country changes.
country.label: Phone

formats.title: Output formats
formats.desc: The format prop controls what update:modelValue emits. national returns what the user typed, international prepends +{dialCode}, and e164 strips non-digits then prepends +{dialCode}.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: outline (default), filled and ghost visual styles.
variants.label: Phone

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three field sizes for different UI densities.
sizes.label: Phone

props.modelValue: Phone number value. The format is controlled by the format prop.
props.country: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the selected country (v-model:country).
props.defaultCountry: Default country code shown on first render when country is not bound.
props.format: Output format emitted via update:modelValue. national returns the raw typed value; international prepends +{dialCode}; e164 returns digits-only E.164.
props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Placeholder text for the number input.
props.helperText: Helper text below the field. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message that marks the field as invalid.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the focus state.
props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.halo: Persistent halo (ring) style. Inherits from ModoProvider.
props.fullWidth: Applies w-full to the field root.
props.readonly: Read-only: maintains normal styling but prevents editing.
props.required: Marks the field as required and shows the visual indicator.
props.loading: Shows a spinner and disables the field during async operations.
props.name: HTML name attribute. Submitted as name-local (number part) and name (full formatted value).
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when no visible label is provided.
props.invalid: Forces invalid state without rendering errorText. Useful inside FormField.
props.ariaDescribedBy: Additional IDs to concatenate into aria-describedby.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted on every input change. Value format is determined by the format prop.
emits.updateCountry: Emitted when the user selects a new country. Payload is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.
emits.focus: Emitted when the number input receives focus.
emits.blur: Emitted when the number input loses focus.

types.title: PhoneInput & PhoneCountry
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for the PhoneInput component props and the internal country data shape.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus between the country selector button, the number input and the next field
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbEnterSpace: Open the country dropdown when the selector button is focused
a11y.kbArrowDown: Move to the next country in the dropdown list
a11y.kbArrowUp: Move to the previous country in the dropdown list
a11y.kbEnterSelect: Select the highlighted country in the dropdown
a11y.kbEscape: Close the country dropdown and return focus to the trigger button
a11y.kbType: Type in the search box to filter countries by name, ISO code or dial code
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true on the phone input when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the input for screen reader context
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.ariaExpanded: Reflects open/closed state of the country dropdown on the trigger button
a11y.ariaHasPopup: Set to listbox on the country selector trigger to announce the dropdown type
a11y.ariaLabel: The country selector button always has an aria-label ('Select country' by default)
a11y.focusComposite: The field is a composite: the country button and the tel input are separate focusable elements
a11y.focusDropdown: On opening, focus moves to the search input inside the dropdown for immediate filtering
